query: SELECT id, section, entity, status, current_stage, progress, started_at, finished_at, error_message, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_minutes FROM sync_logs WHERE section = 'Boonphone' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT id, section, entity, status, current_stage, progress, started_at, finished_at, error_message, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_minutes FROM sync_logs WHERE section = 'Boonphone' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 8;
